title: A Godly Man Kills Procrastination Before It Kills His Week
caption:
A godly man kills procrastination before it kills his week.

It's rarely the hardest task on your list. It's the one you keep circling: the email since Tuesday, the conversation you've rehearsed but haven't had, the workout you keep moving to tomorrow. It doesn't go away. It just gets louder.

Colossians 3:23 doesn't wait for motivation. Whatever you do, work heartily, as for the Lord and not for men. There's no verse that excuses the inbox you still haven't opened.

Every task you postpone is a small debt against next week's version of you, paid with interest: less time, more weight, a longer list.

Pick the one thing you've dodged the longest. Finish it today, before anything else gets your attention.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #manofgod #workethic #colossians #procrastination
